name: adbclaw
description: Android device control CLI for AI agent automation

tools.name: observe
tools.description: Capture screenshot + UI element tree + device state in one call.
tools.returns: screenshot (base64 PNG), UI elements with index/id/text/bounds
tools.when_to_use: Before deciding any action. After every action to verify the result.

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the device screen.
tools.returns: PNG image as base64 or saved to file
tools.when_to_use: When you only need the visual state without UI element data.

tools.name: tap
tools.description: Tap on a UI element or coordinate. Prefer --index (from observe) for reliability.
tools.usage: adbclaw tap {--index N | --id RESOURCE_ID | --text TEXT | X Y}
tools.when_to_use: To click buttons, links, input fields, or any interactive element.

tools.name: long_press
tools.when_to_use: For context menus, drag initiation, or special long-press actions.

tools.name: swipe
tools.description: Swipe from one point to another.
tools.usage: adbclaw swipe X1 Y1 X2 Y2 [--duration 300]
tools.when_to_use: To scroll content, dismiss notifications, or navigate between pages.

tools.name: type
tools.description: Input text into the currently focused field.
tools.when_to_use: After tapping an input field to focus it.

tools.name: key
tools.when_to_use: To navigate back, go home, confirm input, or control device.

tools.name: app_launch
tools.description: Launch an app by package name.
tools.when_to_use: To open a specific app. Use 'app list' first to find the package name.

tools.name: app_current
tools.description: Get the currently focused app and activity.
tools.when_to_use: To check which app is in the foreground.

tools.name: app_list
tools.description: List installed apps on the device.
tools.when_to_use: To find package names of installed apps.

tools.name: device_info
tools.description: Get device details: model, screen size, Android version, battery.
tools.when_to_use: At the start of a session to understand the device.

tools.name: device_list
tools.when_to_use: To see available devices before starting.

tools.name: ui_tree
tools.description: Get the full UI element tree with indexed elements.
tools.when_to_use: When you need detailed UI structure without a screenshot.

tools.name: ui_find
tools.description: Search for UI elements by text, resource-id, or index.
tools.usage: adbclaw ui find {--text TEXT | --id ID | --index N}
tools.when_to_use: To find specific elements without dumping the full tree.

workflow_hints.observe_first: Always run 'observe' before deciding an action and after performing an action to verify results.
workflow_hints.prefer_index: When tapping, prefer --index over coordinates. Indices come from the 'observe' output.
workflow_hints.type_after_focus: Always tap an input field first, then use 'type' to enter text.
workflow_hints.scroll_pattern: To scroll down: swipe from bottom-center to top-center (e.g., swipe 540 1800 540 600).
workflow_hints.error_handling: If an action fails, re-observe to see the current state before retrying.
